# Tomes
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Tomes&prop=wikitext

The tome is the ability of the priest. It heals the players in a circle and gives buffs<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TomeOfFleshlyDesire.png
| link = Tome of Fleshly Desire
| text = Tome of Fleshly Desire
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheTwilightGrimoire.png
| link = The Twilight Grimoire
| text = The Twilight Grimoire
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = TomeOfPain.png
| link = Tome of Pain
| text = Tome of Pain
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheFrozenTome.png
| link = The Frozen Tome
| text = The Frozen Tome
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = AWorthyJewel.png
| link = A Worthy Jewel
| text = A Worthy Jewel
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TomeOfHolyProtection.png
| link = Tome of Holy Protection
| text = Tome of Holy Protection
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TomeOfFrigidProtection.png
| link = Tome of Frigid Protection
| text = Tome of Frigid Protection
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TomeOfPurification.png
| link = Tome of Purification
| text = Tome of Purification
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = BookOfGeb.png
| link = Book of Geb
| text = Book of Geb
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = BookOfTheRejuvenatingRiver.png
| link = Book of the Rejuvenating River
| text = Book of the Rejuvenating River
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = TomeOfCosmicRejuvenation.png
| link = Tome of Cosmic Rejuvenation
| text = Tome of Cosmic Rejuvenation
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TomeOfDivineFavor.png
| link = Tome of Divine Favor
| text = Tome of Divine Favor
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TomeOfHolyGuidance.png
| link = Tome of Holy Guidance
| text = Tome of Holy Guidance
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = HealingTome.png
| link = Healing Tome
| text = Healing Tome
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = RemedyTome.png
| link = Remedy Tome
| text = Remedy Tome
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SpiritSalveTome.png
| link = Spirit Salve Tome
| text = Spirit Salve Tome
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TomeOfRejuvenation.png
| link = Tome of Rejuvenation
| text = Tome of Rejuvenation
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TomeOfRenewing.png
| link = Tome of Renewing
| text = Tome of Renewing
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
